notes: v1.14.3 — DROP-IN of the consolidated external head + folded-in #boot full-bleed. The handoff's v1.14.3 (chat-Claude consolidated head off the v1.13.5 base) contains: (1) rack-elevation FLOOR-MAP tile (BUILD tab; deploy_renderFloorMap, .tile-body/.rk*), (2) NOW-dashboard PHASE PROGRESS pipeline (frontier logic + polish; .pp-*), (3) full-page landing fix (.pl-stage flex + clip-safe radius). Imported byte-identical (gate: node --check 3/3, braces 3435/3435, CRLF 43994 / 0 lone LF -- matched the handoff). THEN re-applied the 2 repo-side v1.13.8 #boot edits the handoff's landing fix was MISSING (it carried only the v1.13.7 flex-stage, which the operator had already rejected as 'still not top/bottom'): #boot padding calc(safe-top+32) 24px calc(safe-bottom+24) -> 0 24px 0; .pl-hint bottom 12px -> calc(12px + var(--safe-bottom)). Without these the bottom dead-band returns (the flex stage fills only to #boot's bottom padding). Operator approved the fold-in (option B). sw.js + version.json bumped to v1.14.3; PHANTOM_APP_VERSION + CSS landing comment were already v1.14.3 in the drop-in. Verified: node --check 3/3 inline scripts, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved (0 lone LF), four stamps lockstep at v1.14.3. NOT device-verified -- on-device pass: landing full-bleed (no bottom band), BUILD>FLOOR MAP rack elevations, NOW PHASE PROGRESS frontier (a build blocked at MECHANICAL shows red pulsing ! with later phases dim, NOT cyan). The separate xlsx/Master load issue is left untouched per the handoff.
